bird.name: Ayacucho antpitta
bird.summary: The Ayacucho antpitta (Grallaria ayacuchensis) is a species of bird in the family Grallaridae. It is endemic to Peru.

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Ayacucho antpitta
relations.evidence: That species inhabits the understory of humid montane forest and secondary forest, heavy with moss and epiphytes, where it favors stands of bamboo and other dense undergrowth

relations.subject: Ayacucho antpitta
relations.evidence: That species inhabits the understory of humid montane forest and secondary forest, heavy with moss and epiphytes, where it favors stands of bamboo and other dense undergrowth
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Ayacucho antpitta
relations.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Grallaria blakei |article-number=e.T22703327A216684003 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-2.RLTS.T22703327A216684003.en}} "The primary threat, at least in the short term, to Ayacucho Antpitta, is habitat destruction primarily through clearing for crops and grazing."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
